description:
Don’t forget to check out Get Your Guide’s unique experiences and tours on your next trip! The tours we took while in Madrid are below ⬇️
👑 Royal Palace Guided Tour https://gyg.me/0svz7XK9
🖼️ Prado Museum Skip the Line Tickets https://gyg.me/ztnSeXBg
👩🏼‍🎨 Reina Sofía Museum Tickets https://gyg.me/xSc29MfB
🚖 Get Acquainted with the city on a Tuk Tuk tour https://gyg.me/V3o0AzgM

If you have more time, check out these day trips from Madrid. We’ve visited them all before and they are AMAZING!
🏰 Segovia and Avila Day Trip from Madrid https://gyg.me/ONaxPkCr
🍷 Wine Tasting in Ribera del Duero (Spain’s second largest wine region) https://gyg.me/3wX5nU7f 🍇 You can learn more about this wine region here https://youtu.be/6EWbUx6ZUD8

👩🏽‍💻 H E L P F U L   B L O G   P O S T S
🏨 Where to Stay in Madrid (Best Hotels): https://eatseerv.com/where-to-stay-in-madrid/
→ https://eatseerv.com/best-barcelona-accommodations-by-neighborhood/
🥘 Where to Eat in Madrid (Food Guide):
→ https://eatseerv.com/best-places-to-eat-in-madrid/
📖 Spain Travel Guide (Tips Before You Go)
→ https://eatseerv.com/tips-for-traveling-in-spain/
🦐 3-day Madrid Itinerary
→ https://eatseerv.com/3-days-in-madrid/
🗣️ How we learned Spanish
→ https://eatseerv.com/learning-spanish-as-a-digital-nomad/

🏨 Need a place to stay in Madrid? Check out these top hotels https://tripadvisor.tp.st/1tP5LUbc

00:00 Intro to Madrid travel vlog
00:33 Plaza Callao (Madrid's Busiest Plaza)
00:59 Madrid Plaza Mayor
01:53 Merca de San Miguel (plus better tapas option)!
04:16 Touring Spain's Royal Palace https://gyg.me/8QbatCdQ
07:25 What to Eat in Madrid Spain (Cocido)
10:03 Madrid Golden Triangle of Museums https://gyg.me/VXFcXPbg
11:22 The Best Churros in Madrid
12:18 Exploring Madrid
13:20 Retiro Park
15:48 The Best sunset spot in Madrid
17:32 DIY Tapa Crawl in Madrid (Best Tapas on Calle Cava Baja)
19:59 Our last meal and Madrid (hidden gem)

If you're coming to Madrid, this travel vlog is a one-stop shop for the best things to do in the city. We take you with us as we eat loads of tapas, show you traditional Spanish foods to eat, and the top places to visit in Madrid, Spain.
▬▬▬
